title: memecylon schraderbergense
intro: Memecylon schraderbergense is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Memecylon schraderbergense include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Memecylon schraderbergense can be made in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to treat various health issues.
